title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on Shree Laxmi Co-operative Bank Ltd., Pune
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated May 22, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹2 lakh (Rupees Two Lakh only) on Shree Laxmi Co-operative Bank Ltd., Pune (the bank) for non-compliance with certain directions issued by RBI on ‘Know Your Customer (KYC)’; `Maintenance of Deposit Accounts – Primary (Urban) Co-operative Banks’ and `Inoperative Accounts / Unclaimed Deposits in Banks – Revised Instructions’. This penalty has been imposed in
